title: Sātkhira heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sātkhira with a Z-Score of +3.80. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sātkhira has reached a critical level, with a Z-Score of +3.80 and a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is exceptionally high, resulting in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.3 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 78% and the wind speed is 11.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's effects immediately.
